sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ ثَلْجٌ كَثِيرٌ عَلَى الْمَدِينَةِ اللَّيْلَةَ الْمَاضِيَةَ.
sentences.translation: Sinoć je na grad pao mnogo snijega.
sentences.translationEn: A lot of snow fell on the city last night.

sentences.arabic: أَغْلَقَتِ بَعْضُ الْمَدَارِسُ أَبْوَابَهَا صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Neke škole su jutros zatvorile svoja vrata.
sentences.translationEn: Some schools closed their doors this morning.

sentences.arabic: لَعِبَ الأَطْفَالُ فِي الثَّلْجِ أَمَامَ بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su se igrala u snijegu ispred svojih kuća.
sentences.translationEn: The children played in the snow in front of their houses.

sentences.arabic: تَوَقَّعَتِ الأَرْصَادُ الْجَوِّيَّةُ اسْتِمْرَارَ الثَّلْجِ غَدًا.
sentences.translation: Meteorolozi su predvidjeli nastavak snijega sutra.
sentences.translationEn: The weather forecast predicted more snow tomorrow.
